tests.name: test_successful_login
tests.purpose: Playwright test for Successful Login workflow
tests.code:
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_successful_login(page: Page) -> None:
    """Test Successful Login workflow."""
    page.goto('http://localhost:5001')
    page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle')
    assert page.url

tests.name: test_invalid_login
tests.purpose: Playwright test for Invalid Login workflow
tests.code:
from playwright.sync_api import Page
